title: onobrychis elymaitica
intro: Onobrychis elymaitica, also known as Elymais or Persian clover, is a perennial legume native to Iran. The medicinal properties of Onobrychis elymaitica lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis elymaitica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
